topic: yield_total/log_count status gate vs observed source
decision_taken: implement kernel STATUS_CONTRACT (require-confirmed with pending-only partners) — the bound pending-status-gates decision — knowing the observed source counts pending logs in both probes
reversal_condition: Duke re-binds pending-status-gates toward source fidelity for the log family

topic: no as-of gate on yield/count folds
decision_taken: yield_total and log_count fold over all recorded events regardless of effective time (future-dated done logs count now), matching the observed boundary; the kernel binds no time gate for these projections
reversal_condition: an observation showing the source as-of-gating these collections, or a kernel row adding a time gate

decision_taken: unit strings are opaque and compared exactly (kilogram != kilograms); no normalization layer
reversal_condition: a fixture family mixing unit spellings for the same physical unit within one feature

decision_taken: listActivityLogsForAsset orders newest occurredAt first per the activity contract, while the shared store's canonical order is ascending (LogQueryFactory) — the adapter reverses; getFirst = newest
reversal_condition: cross-feature reader flags ordering incoherence with observation's ascending getFirstLog

decision_taken: abandoned is treated as not-confirmed: inert to official numerics, visible in pending-only partners; no distinct abandoned projection
reversal_condition: an observed fixture distinguishing abandoned from pending in any projection
